metadata.title: Cambridge Starters Gold Mock 3
metadata.description: M4.1 manually authored Pre-A1 Starters gold mock — Food, Sports & Travel theme. Full 43-item form with listening, reading & writing, and speaking tasks aligned to the M2.0 blueprint.
metadata.authoringNotes: M4.1 Gold Mock — manually authored and academically reviewed.

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Look at the pictures. Listen and draw a line from each name to the correct person.

This is Jake. He's wearing a green football shirt today.
Sofia is holding a big bowl of fruit for the picnic.
Omar has got a blue suitcase. He's ready to travel.
Priya is wearing a red swimming cap at the pool.
Look at Finn. He's eating a sandwich on the train.
audio.caption: Link names to pictures

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and write the missing word or number.

Amy always drinks cold milk for breakfast.
Carlos plays tennis every Tuesday after school.
Next week the family is going to the beach for their holiday.
There are four cheese sandwiches in the lunch box.
The big tour bus is yellow with black windows.
audio.caption: Write words or numbers

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and tick the correct picture.

The girl is eating a big red strawberry.
The boys are playing basketball in the sports hall.
The plane is flying high in the sky.
Dad orders a cup of hot tea at the café.
The tourists are looking at the sea and taking photos on the ferry.
audio.caption: Tick the correct picture

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and colour or draw.

Colour the apple green, please.
Now colour the football orange.
Draw an X on the airport on the map.
Colour the birthday cake pink.
Draw a line from the boy to the small boat on the lake.
audio.caption: Colour and draw

questions.questionText: Listen. Which boy is Jake?

pairs.rightText: Boy wearing a green football shirt

questions.questionText: Read: "Grandpa is making vegetable soup in a bi…" Choose the correct picture.
questions.passage: Grandpa is making vegetable soup in a big pot on the stove.

choices.text: Old man cooking soup in a kitchen
Old man sleeping on a bus

content.passage: Grandpa is making vegetable soup in a big pot on the stove.

questions.questionText: Read: "The children are running a race on the s…" Choose the correct picture.
questions.passage: The children are running a race on the school sports field.

choices.text: Children running on a sports field
Children eating cake at a party
Children reading books in a library

content.passage: The children are running a race on the school sports field.

questions.questionText: Read: "We are waiting for our train on platform…" Choose the correct picture.
questions.passage: We are waiting for our train on platform three at the station.

choices.text: Family waiting on a train platform

content.passage: We are waiting for our train on platform three at the station.

questions.questionText: Read: "Every Friday Dad buys fresh bread and gr…" Choose the correct picture.
questions.passage: Every Friday Dad buys fresh bread and grapes at the market.

choices.text: Man buying bread and grapes at a market

content.passage: Every Friday Dad buys fresh bread and grapes at the market.

questions.questionText: Read: "It is getting dark, so we are putting up…" Choose the correct picture.
questions.passage: It is getting dark, so we are putting up our tent at the campsite near the lake.

choices.text: Family putting up a tent at a campsite
Family eating breakfast in a café
Family watching TV on the sofa

content.passage: It is getting dark, so we are putting up our tent at the campsite near the lake.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "My name is Marco. I am nine years o…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: My name is Marco. I am nine years old. My favourite food is pasta with tomato sauce. I don't like fish, but I love cheese on my pizza. On Saturdays I help Mum make pancakes for breakfast.

choices.text: Marco's favourite food is pasta with tomato sauce.
Marco loves eating fish every day.
Marco never helps in the kitchen.

content.passage: My name is Marco. I am nine years old. My favourite food is pasta with tomato sauce. I don't like fish, but I love cheese on my pizza. On Saturdays I help Mum make pancakes for breakfast.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "I go to the Sports Club on Mondays…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: I go to the Sports Club on Mondays and Wednesdays. I learn to swim in the pool and play badminton in the hall. My coach is called Mr Lee. He says I am getting faster every week.

choices.text: The writer goes to the Sports Club twice a week.
The writer only plays football at the club.
Mr Lee is a maths teacher.

content.passage: I go to the Sports Club on Mondays and Wednesdays. I learn to swim in the pool and play badminton in the hall. My coach is called Mr Lee. He says I am getting faster every week.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Last summer we flew to Spain for tw…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Last summer we flew to Spain for two weeks. We stayed in a hotel near the sea. Every morning we ate fresh fruit for breakfast and walked along the beach. I collected ten pretty shells.

choices.text: They flew to Spain for their holiday.
They travelled to Spain by train.
They stayed in a tent in the mountains.

content.passage: Last summer we flew to Spain for two weeks. We stayed in a hotel near the sea. Every morning we ate fresh fruit for breakfast and walked along the beach. I collected ten pretty shells.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Yesterday was Sports Day at school.…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Yesterday was Sports Day at school. After the races we had a big picnic. There were sandwiches, watermelon and juice for everyone. My team won the relay race and we got gold medals.

choices.text: They had a picnic after Sports Day.
Nobody ate any food at Sports Day.
The writer's team lost every race.

content.passage: Yesterday was Sports Day at school. After the races we had a big picnic. There were sandwiches, watermelon and juice for everyone. My team won the relay race and we got gold medals.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Next month our class is going to th…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Next month our class is going to the City Museum by coach. We can see old cars, dinosaur bones and a model of a spaceship. Our teacher says we must bring a packed lunch and a notebook to draw pictures.

choices.text: The class is visiting the City Museum next month.
They are going to the museum by plane.
Students cannot bring any food on the trip.

content.passage: Next month our class is going to the City Museum by coach. We can see old cars, dinosaur bones and a model of a spaceship. Our teacher says we must bring a packed lunch and a notebook to draw pictures.

questions.questionText: Look at the two sports hall pictures. Tell your partner about the differences.
questions.prompt: Look at the two pictures of a sports hall. Tell your partner about five differences between them.
followUpQuestions: How many basketballs are on the floor in picture A?
What colour is the goal in picture B?
Is there a coach in both pictures?
Where is the water bottle in picture A?
What are the children doing in picture B?
